events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: personnel in the swing radius of operating mechanized equipment is a critical struck-by/crush hazard under OSHA 1926 Subpart O — decision is `fail`. Required immediate controls: stop equipment, barricade the swing radius, keep ground personnel out while the machine is powered/operating, assign a dedicated spotter with operator communication, verify visibility aids/back-up alarms, and hold a toolbox talk before resuming work.
